<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\Exception; /** * @author Steve Hutchins <hutchinsteve@gmail.com> */ class UnprocessableEntityHttpException extends HttpException { public function __construct(string $message = '', ?\Throwable $previous = null, int $code = 0, array $headers = []) { parent::__construct(422, $message, $previous, $headers, $code); } }
